violations.description: Each scenario re-runs number-mapping bootstrap, adding repeated setup overhead.
violations.suggestion: Use scoped setup helpers or pre-seeded fixtures with explicit reset semantics.

violations.description: Single large spec can limit worker-level concurrency and selective reruns.
violations.suggestion: Split into focused files to improve parallel scheduling and change-targeted runs.
violations.code_snippet: // e-2 story scenarios all in one 595-line file

violations.description: Only one scenario uses Promise.all despite several setup operations that could be optimized.
violations.suggestion: Apply parallel setup where state isolation allows it, while preserving determinism.

slow_tests: No explicit slow scenario identified; overhead is mainly repeated setup

recommendations: Reduce repeated preconditions through reusable setup wrappers
Split scenario groups into separate files for better worker utilization
Preserve Promise.all pattern for concurrency-specific contract validation
summary: Runtime posture is good for API tests, with moderate improvement opportunity in setup reuse and file-level parallelization granularity.
